stem:
(x + 4)² + (y − 19)² = 121

The graph of the given equation is a circle in the xy-plane. The point (a, b) lies on the circle. Which of the following is a possible value for a ?
explanation: The circle has center (−4, 19) and radius √121 = 11, so x-coordinates on it range from −4 − 11 = −15 to −4 + 11 = 7. Of the choices, only −14 falls within −15 ≤ a ≤ 7.
